title: 高频口语表达块 2
description: 围绕假设确认、过渡衔接、软化请求、收窄选项、部分认同、升级担忧、重新框定和推动决策等更高互动压力下的核心 spoken functions 组织的进阶口语表达块训练包。

units.title: 确认假设和边界
units.communicativeGoal: 在继续讨论前先确认彼此当前的前提假设
activationPrompts: 你觉得大家好像默认了某个前提
你想先把讨论的边界说清楚

items.englishText: Just to be clear, are we assuming that's already fixed?
items.chinesePrompt: 确认一下，我们是不是默认那部分已经定了？
variants: Just so I'm clear, are we assuming that's already fixed?
notes: 用来先校正默认前提。

items.englishText: I may be wrong, but I think we're treating two things as the same.
items.chinesePrompt: 也可能是我理解错了，但我觉得我们把两件事当成一件事了。
variants: I might be wrong, but I think we're treating those as the same thing.
notes: 先降低攻击性，再指出假设问题。
pronunciationTargets: treating two things as the same
commonMistakes: Maybe I am wrong but these two are same.

items.englishText: Before we go further, can we check what we're taking as a given here?
items.chinesePrompt: 在继续之前，我们能先确认一下这里哪些是既定前提吗？
variants: Before we go any further, can we check what we're treating as a given here?
notes: 适合进入复杂讨论前先对齐前提。
commonMistakes: Before continue, can we check what is already given?
sampleOutputs: Before we go further, can we check what we're taking as a given here?

items.englishText: Just to be clear, are we assuming the timeline stays the same, or is that still open?
items.chinesePrompt: 确认一下，我们是不是默认时间线不变，还是这件事还没定？
notes: 先拆清前提，再继续推进。
commonMistakes: Timeline is same or still not decided?
items.contextText: 你发现团队讨论建立在一个未确认的时间假设上。

successCriteria: 完成“确认假设和边界”对应的沟通动作
在继续讨论前先确认彼此当前的前提假设
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你觉得大家好像默认了某个前提
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想先把讨论的边界说清楚
换一个相近场景，再完成“确认假设和边界”这个口语动作。

units.title: 自然过渡到下一个点
units.communicativeGoal: 在不打断氛围的情况下，把对话平滑切到下一个重点
activationPrompts: 你想结束一个话题并顺到下一个话题
你想避免生硬转场

items.englishText: That brings us to the bigger question.
items.chinesePrompt: 这就带出了一个更大的问题。
variants: That brings us to the larger question.
notes: 很适合把局部点过渡到主线。
commonMistakes: This brings us the bigger question.

items.englishText: On a related note, we should also think about timing.
items.chinesePrompt: 顺便说一句，时间安排这件事我们也得考虑。
variants: On a related note, timing is something we should think about too.
notes: 可以自然地引入相邻议题。
commonMistakes: Related note, we should think timing.

items.englishText: That makes sense, and it probably leads us to the next decision we need to make.
items.chinesePrompt: 这说得通，而且也自然引出了我们接下来要做的决定。
variants: That makes sense, and it probably leads into the next decision we need to make.
notes: 先认可，再引向下一步。
pronunciationTargets: leads us to the next decision
commonMistakes: This makes sense and goes to next decision.
sampleOutputs: That makes sense, and it probably leads us to the next decision we need to make.

items.englishText: That's helpful context. On a related note, we should also talk about what happens if demand is higher than expected.
items.chinesePrompt: 这些背景很有帮助。顺着这个，我觉得我们也该聊聊如果需求高于预期会怎么样。
notes: 先接住前文，再平滑引到风险讨论。
commonMistakes: This context is useful. We also should talk if demand is more than expected.
items.contextText: 你要把讨论从背景信息转到风险准备。

successCriteria: 完成“自然过渡到下一个点”对应的沟通动作
在不打断氛围的情况下，把对话平滑切到下一个重点
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你想结束一个话题并顺到下一个话题
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想避免生硬转场
换一个相近场景，再完成“自然过渡到下一个点”这个口语动作。

units.title: 软化请求和要求
units.communicativeGoal: 在需要别人配合时，用更柔和但清晰的方式提出请求
activationPrompts: 你需要别人做一件事，但不想显得太硬
你想既礼貌又不模糊地提出要求

items.englishText: Would you mind taking another look when you get a chance?
items.chinesePrompt: 你有空的时候能不能再帮我看一眼？
variants: Would you mind taking one more look when you get a chance?
notes: 既礼貌又不失明确。
commonMistakes: Can you check again when free?

items.englishText: If possible, I'd really appreciate it by tomorrow.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果可以的话，我会很感激你能在明天前处理。
variants: If possible, I'd really appreciate having it by tomorrow.
notes: 适合带一个温和的时间要求。
commonMistakes: If can, I appreciate you tomorrow finish.

items.englishText: I know you're busy, but could I ask you to prioritise this one for now?
items.chinesePrompt: 我知道你很忙，但我能不能请你先优先处理这个？
variants: I know you're busy, but could I ask you to prioritise this for the moment?
notes: 先承认对方压力，再提出优先级请求。
commonMistakes: I know you're busy but please do this first.
sampleOutputs: I know you're busy, but could I ask you to prioritise this one for now?

items.englishText: Would you mind sending me a quick update later today, just so I know where things stand?
items.chinesePrompt: 你今天晚点能不能给我发个简短更新，让我知道进展到哪了？
notes: 柔和请求加说明目的，更容易被接受。
commonMistakes: Can you send me update later so I know progress?
items.contextText: 你想追进度，但不想显得像在催人。

successCriteria: 完成“软化请求和要求”对应的沟通动作
在需要别人配合时，用更柔和但清晰的方式提出请求
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你需要别人做一件事，但不想显得太硬
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想既礼貌又不模糊地提出要求
换一个相近场景，再完成“软化请求和要求”这个口语动作。

units.title: 收窄选项和推进选择
units.communicativeGoal: 把开放讨论收束成几个可比较的选项
activationPrompts: 你觉得讨论选项太多了
你想把问题变成几个可选方向

items.englishText: Realistically, I think this comes down to two options.
items.chinesePrompt: 现实一点看，我觉得这件事其实就归结为两个选项。
variants: Realistically, I think we're down to two options here.
notes: 适合收束过于发散的讨论。
commonMistakes: Actually this has only two options.

items.englishText: Maybe we should rule out anything that's too costly.
items.chinesePrompt: 也许我们应该先排除那些成本太高的方案。
variants: Maybe we should rule out any option that's too costly.
notes: 先设筛选条件，再谈选择。
commonMistakes: We should remove options too expensive.

items.englishText: If we focus on what we can actually deliver this month, the choice gets a lot clearer.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果我们聚焦这个月实际能交付什么，选择就会清楚很多。
variants: If we focus on what we can realistically deliver this month, the choice becomes much clearer.
notes: 用限制条件帮助大家更快选择。
commonMistakes: If focus what we can do this month, choice is more clear.
slots: focus on what we can deliver
sampleOutputs: If we focus on what we can actually deliver this month, the choice gets a lot clearer.

items.englishText: We have a lot of ideas on the table, but realistically I think this comes down to speed versus flexibility.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们现在桌面上有很多想法，但现实一点看，其实就是速度和灵活性的取舍。
notes: 把复杂讨论压缩成可比较维度。
commonMistakes: There are many ideas, but this is speed and flexibility choice.
items.contextText: 你在讨论中想帮助大家收敛到几个关键维度。

successCriteria: 完成“收窄选项和推进选择”对应的沟通动作
把开放讨论收束成几个可比较的选项
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你觉得讨论选项太多了
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想把问题变成几个可选方向
换一个相近场景，再完成“收窄选项和推进选择”这个口语动作。

units.title: 部分认同后再转向
units.communicativeGoal: 先接住对方的合理部分，再表达不同角度或保留意见
activationPrompts: 你并不是完全不同意，只想补充另一面
你想减少直接冲突感

items.englishText: I agree with that to an extent.
items.chinesePrompt: 我在一定程度上同意这个。
variants: I agree with that up to a point.
notes: 为后续转向留出空间。

items.englishText: I can see the logic there, but I think there's another side to it.
items.chinesePrompt: 我能理解这个逻辑，但我觉得这件事还有另一面。
variants: I can see the logic there, but I think there's another angle to it.
notes: 适合温和引出不同视角。
commonMistakes: I understand your logic but there is another side.

items.englishText: I think you're right about the short term, but I'm less sure this still works longer term.
items.chinesePrompt: 我觉得你说的短期上是对的，但我不太确定长期看这是否还成立。
variants: I think you're right in the short term, but I'm less sure this still works in the long term.
notes: 把 disagreement 放在时间维度上会更自然。
commonMistakes: You are right now but maybe not in long time.
sampleOutputs: I think you're right about the short term, but I'm less sure this still works longer term.

items.englishText: I can see the logic there, and I agree with part of it. At the same time, I think we're underestimating the effort on our side.
items.chinesePrompt: 我能理解这个逻辑，而且其中一部分我也同意。与此同时，我觉得我们低估了我们这边要投入的工作量。
notes: 先认同，再明确指出保留点。
commonMistakes: I agree part of it, but we think less about effort.
items.contextText: 你不想直接反对，但要把团队拉回现实成本。

successCriteria: 完成“部分认同后再转向”对应的沟通动作
先接住对方的合理部分，再表达不同角度或保留意见
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你并不是完全不同意，只想补充另一面
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想减少直接冲突感
换一个相近场景，再完成“部分认同后再转向”这个口语动作。

units.title: 升级担忧但不制造对立
units.communicativeGoal: 在风险变大时提高语气强度，但仍保持合作姿态
activationPrompts: 你觉得问题已经不能只轻描淡写了
你想更明确地提醒风险

items.englishText: I'm increasingly concerned this could become a real issue.
items.chinesePrompt: 我越来越担心这会变成一个真正的问题。
variants: I'm getting increasingly concerned this could become a real issue.
notes: 比 I'm worried 更强，但还算克制。
commonMistakes: I more and more worry this is a real problem.

items.englishText: At that point, it stops being a minor problem.
items.chinesePrompt: 到了那个阶段，这就不再是个小问题了。
variants: At that point, this stops being a small issue.
notes: 用来提升问题严重性。
commonMistakes: Then this is not a small problem anymore.

items.englishText: What worries me is that if we leave this too late, it becomes much harder to recover from.
items.chinesePrompt: 我担心的是，如果这件事拖得太晚，后面就更难补救了。
variants: What worries me is that if we leave this too late, it becomes much harder to recover.
notes: 把风险讲成因果链，比单纯反对更有说服力。
commonMistakes: I worry if we leave too late, it is harder to fix back.
sampleOutputs: What worries me is that if we leave this too late, it becomes much harder to recover from.

items.englishText: I know we're trying to keep this lightweight, but I'm increasingly concerned that we're treating a structural issue like a temporary one.
items.chinesePrompt: 我知道我们想把这件事处理得轻一点，但我越来越担心我们把一个结构性问题当成临时问题在处理。
notes: 适合在风险被低估时提高提醒强度。
commonMistakes: We want light way, but this is actually structure issue.
items.contextText: 你要把一个被轻描淡写的问题重新提升到应有等级。

successCriteria: 完成“升级担忧但不制造对立”对应的沟通动作
在风险变大时提高语气强度，但仍保持合作姿态
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你觉得问题已经不能只轻描淡写了
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想更明确地提醒风险
换一个相近场景，再完成“升级担忧但不制造对立”这个口语动作。

units.title: 重新框定问题
units.communicativeGoal: 当讨论陷入错误角度时，把问题换个框架重新看
activationPrompts: 你觉得大家问的问题本身就不对
你想从另一个维度看同一个问题

items.englishText: Maybe the real question isn't speed, but predictability.
items.chinesePrompt: 也许真正的问题不是速度，而是可预期性。
variants: Maybe the real question here isn't speed, but predictability.
notes: 经典 reframing 句型。
commonMistakes: Maybe real question is not speed but can predict.

items.englishText: I think we're framing this too narrowly.
items.chinesePrompt: 我觉得我们现在把这个问题框得太窄了。
variants: I think we're looking at this a bit too narrowly.
notes: 用来提醒大家跳出当前角度。
commonMistakes: We are thinking this too narrow.

items.englishText: Instead of asking how fast we can ship it, maybe we should ask what we can support well after launch.
items.chinesePrompt: 与其问我们能多快上线，也许我们更该问上线后哪些东西我们能稳定支持。
variants: Instead of asking how quickly we can ship it, maybe we should ask what we can support well after launch.
notes: 用 instead of asking 重构问题方向很自然。
commonMistakes: Instead ask how fast we ship, we should ask what we can support after.
sampleOutputs: Instead of asking how fast we can ship it, maybe we should ask what we can support well after launch.

items.englishText: I think we're framing this too narrowly. The issue isn't whether we can build it, but whether we can maintain it once usage grows.
items.chinesePrompt: 我觉得我们现在把这个问题框得太窄了。问题不是我们能不能做出来，而是用户量上来之后我们能不能维护住。
notes: 把技术可行性重构为可持续性问题。
commonMistakes: Question is not can build, but can maintain when users more.
items.contextText: 团队一直在谈实现速度，但你更关注后续维护能力。

successCriteria: 完成“重新框定问题”对应的沟通动作
当讨论陷入错误角度时，把问题换个框架重新看
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你觉得大家问的问题本身就不对
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想从另一个维度看同一个问题
换一个相近场景，再完成“重新框定问题”这个口语动作。

units.title: 推动决策落地
units.communicativeGoal: 把讨论从信息交换推进到可执行决定
activationPrompts: 你觉得大家已经讨论够了，需要收敛决策
你想把下一步说清楚

items.englishText: What are we actually deciding today?
items.chinesePrompt: 我们今天到底要决定什么？
variants: What exactly are we deciding today?
notes: 适合在讨论发散时重新聚焦。
commonMistakes: What do we decide today actually?

items.englishText: Are we ready to make a call on this?
items.chinesePrompt: 这件事我们现在能拍板了吗？
variants: Are we ready to make a decision on this?
notes: 更口语化的推动决策表达。
commonMistakes: Are we ready decide this now?

items.englishText: If we're not deciding today, then I think we should be explicit about what still needs to be true before we can.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果我们今天不做决定，那我觉得我们至少应该明确还差哪些条件才能做决定。
variants: If we're not deciding today, we should at least be explicit about what still has to be true before we can.
notes: 即使不拍板，也要把决策条件说清楚。
commonMistakes: If not decide today, we should say what conditions are missing.
sampleOutputs: If we're not deciding today, then I think we should be explicit about what still needs to be true before we can.

items.englishText: We've explored the trade-offs pretty thoroughly. Are we ready to make a call, or do we still need one more input before we do?
items.chinesePrompt: 这些取舍我们已经讨论得很充分了。我们现在能拍板了吗，还是还缺一个关键信息才能定？
notes: 推动进入决策区，同时给未决情况留出口。
commonMistakes: We discussed enough. Can decide now or still need one more thing?
items.contextText: 你要把长期讨论推进到明确决定或明确缺口。

successCriteria: 完成“推动决策落地”对应的沟通动作
把讨论从信息交换推进到可执行决定
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：你觉得大家已经讨论够了，需要收敛决策
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想把下一步说清楚
换一个相近场景，再完成“推动决策落地”这个口语动作。

units.title: 重新定义问题
units.communicativeGoal: 把混乱讨论重新框定成更清楚的问题
activationPrompts: 讨论有点散，你想重新定义问题
你想把问题说得更可解决

items.englishText: Maybe the real question is how much risk we're willing to take.
items.chinesePrompt: 也许真正的问题是我们愿意承担多大风险。
variants: Maybe the bigger question is how much risk we're willing to take.
notes: 把争论转成核心问题。
commonMistakes: the real problem is how much risk we take.

items.englishText: I'd frame this as a timing issue, not a quality issue.
items.chinesePrompt: 我会把这看成时间问题，而不是质量问题。
variants: I would frame this more as a timing issue.
notes: frame as 用于重新定义问题。
commonMistakes: I frame it to timing issue.

items.englishText: Maybe we should separate {the timing issue} from {the quality issue}.
items.chinesePrompt: 也许我们应该把时间问题和质量问题分开。
variants: Maybe we should separate timing from quality.
notes: 把混在一起的问题拆开。
sampleOutputs: Maybe we should separate {the timing issue} from {the quality issue}.

items.englishText: Maybe the real question is timing. I'd frame this as a timing issue, not a quality issue.
items.chinesePrompt: 也许真正的问题是时间。我会把这看作时间问题，不是质量问题。
notes: 先重定义，再明确排除。
items.contextText: 讨论有点散，你想重新定义问题

successCriteria: 完成“重新定义问题”对应的沟通动作
把混乱讨论重新框定成更清楚的问题
语气自然清楚，适合中性日常或工作场景
在有互动压力时仍能把重点说完整
retryPrompts: 只重说关键一句：讨论有点散，你想重新定义问题
这次先放慢语速，把沟通目标说完整。
variantPrompts: 你想把问题说得更可解决
换一个相近场景，再完成“重新定义问题”这个口语动作。

units.title: 控制语气强度
units.communicativeGoal: 在表达意见时控制强弱，不显得过度绝对
activationPrompts: 你有不同看法，但不想说得太绝对
你想把强硬判断改得柔和一点

items.englishText: I'm leaning toward the second option.
items.chinesePrompt: 我更倾向于第二个选项。
variants: I'm leaning more toward the second option.
notes: 比 I choose 更柔和。

items.englishText: That feels a bit too risky to me.
items.chinesePrompt: 我感觉那有点太冒险了。
variants: That seems a bit too risky to me.
notes: a bit 和 to me 都能降强度。
commonMistakes: it is very risky for me.

items.englishText: I wouldn't say {it's wrong}, but it may be risky.
items.chinesePrompt: 我不会说它错了，但可能有风险。
variants: I wouldn't call it wrong, but it may be risky.
notes: 先避免否定，再表达担忧。
sampleOutputs: I wouldn't say {it's wrong}, but it may be risky.

items.englishText: I wouldn't say it's wrong, but it feels a bit too risky to me.
